scripts.test: pnpm -C ../sdk run build:check:fresh || pnpm -C ../sdk run build && USE_RELAY_SERVER=1 playwright test --reporter=line
scripts.test:lite: pnpm -C ../sdk run build:check:fresh || pnpm -C ../sdk run build && USE_RELAY_SERVER=1 playwright test -c playwright.lite.config.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:inline: pnpm -C ../sdk run build:check:fresh || pnpm -C ../sdk run build && USE_RELAY_SERVER=1 playwright test --reporter=line
scripts.test:unit: pnpm -C ../sdk run build:check:fresh || pnpm -C ../sdk run build && playwright test ./unit --reporter=line
scripts.test:signers:gates: pnpm -C ../sdk run build:check:fresh || pnpm -C ../sdk run build && USE_RELAY_SERVER=0 playwright test ./unit/loginReadiness.gate.unit.test.ts ./unit/thresholdEcdsa.commitQueue.unit.test.ts ./unit/walletIframeHost.signTempoCancel.unit.test.ts ./unit/tempo.signingAuthMode.unit.test.ts ./unit/smartAccount.deploymentGate.unit.test.ts ./wallet-iframe/router.behavior.concurrent.test.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:signer-parity:web-wasm-replay: pnpm -C ../sdk run build:check:fresh || pnpm -C ../sdk run build && playwright test ./unit/signingVectors.webWasmReplay.unit.test.ts --workers=1 --reporter=line
scripts.test:signer-parity: pnpm run test:signer-parity:rust && pnpm run test:signer-parity:web-wasm-replay
